control_awareness: Aware that amount-based approval control (P2P-C-001) requires department_head approval for this amount. Also aware that segregation of duties (P2P-C-002) prevents self-approval. Approval is required before PO issuance (P2P-C-003).
expected_control_effect: The system will route the request for department_head approval before purchase order issuance, ensuring compliance with approval and segregation controls.
overall_reason: Given the workload pressure and the need to minimize rework and coordination, creating a single purchase request for the full amount using the normal route is the most efficient and compliant approach. There is sufficient information to proceed without consultations or postponement.
reason: The purchase amount exceeds the 1,000,000 threshold, so it requires department_head approval. Creating a single purchase request at the full amount minimizes coordination overhead and rework under workload pressure.
